description: Artificially inflated schedule buffer masks delays
standard_mitigation: Maintain transparent schedules; conduct independent reviews

description: Productivity loss due to extreme summer temperatures
standard_mitigation: Schedule outdoor work Oct-Apr; provide cooling stations

description: Delays at port or customs for imported materials
standard_mitigation: Maintain buffer stock; pre-approve suppliers; source locally

description: Longer than expected time for NOCs and permits
standard_mitigation: Ensure complete submissions; engage dedicated permits manager

description: Soil conditions differ from initial report
standard_mitigation: Comprehensive soil investigation; contingency in foundation budget
Lock prices in contracts; include escalation clause
Firm scope freeze; change order procedures

description: Exchange rate changes affecting imported materials
standard_mitigation: Hedge currency risk; local sourcing strategy

description: Work restrictions due to health emergencies
standard_mitigation: Business continuity plan; remote work protocols
